name: Thanos Prometheus API
what_it_does: Open-source Prometheus long-term storage and high-availability toolkit with Prometheus-compatible API — extending Prometheus with unlimited retention via object storage (S3, GCS, Azure), global query view across multiple Prometheus instances, and deduplication.
use_cases: Querying metrics across multiple Prometheus instances via unified Thanos Query API
Storing Prometheus metrics long-term in object storage (S3, GCS) via Thanos Store
Setting up highly available Prometheus with Thanos Sidecar for redundancy
Querying historical metrics beyond Prometheus local retention limits
Building multi-cluster observability with Thanos as global query frontend
not_for: Teams not running Prometheus (Thanos extends Prometheus)
best_when: A team already running Prometheus needs long-term metrics storage, multi-cluster query federation, and high availability without replacing their existing Prometheus setup.
avoid_when: You don't use Prometheus, need a fully managed solution (use VictoriaMetrics Cloud or Grafana Cloud), or prefer a unified solution over composable components.

auth.notes: No auth in open-source Thanos by default. Relies on network-level security or reverse proxy. gRPC for internal component communication. Prometheus-compatible HTTP API for queries. External auth via proxy (oauth2-proxy, etc.).

pricing.paid_tiers: No commercial offering; community support only
pricing.notes: 100% open-source (Apache 2.0). CNCF Incubating project. Self-hosted only — no commercial SaaS. Community support. Originated from Improbable Engineering (UK). Object storage costs are primary operational cost. Strong production adoption at Spotify, Red Hat, Cloudflare.

performance.rate_limits: Self-hosted — no rate limits beyond resource constraints

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Prometheus-compatible HTTP API for Querier component. gRPC for StoreAPI (internal). No auth by default. Good component documentation. Multi-component architecture (Sidecar, Store, Query, Compact, Ruler) — must understand which component exposes which API. Self-hosted endpoint varies.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All metric query operations fully idempotent. Object storage operations managed by Thanos internally. Compact and deduplicate operations idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Multi-component architecture — Querier, Store, Sidecar, Compact are separate processes
No default authentication — must secure with reverse proxy
Object storage costs are separate from Thanos compute
Query fan-out to multiple Prometheus instances can be slow for large queries

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS configurable (gRPC TLS and HTTP TLS). No default auth — rely on network security or reverse proxy. CNCF project — community security reviews. Open-source Apache 2.0. Self-hosted — data control is complete. Object storage credentials must be secured separately.
